reviews.review_description: It was on my wishlist and i think i bought it but it did look cool two although i did not want to buy it cause i have no money to pay my parents back

I truly wasn't expecting much from this title, but figured it was worth having for free.
I gave it avtry, and after 2-3 minutes I fell in love with it, even being unable to stop myself from playing until I had already beaten levels 1 through 6. 😅
The music is nice, the visuals well done and very charming, and the gameplay simple but addictive as well as there being 150 levels to complete which gives the game plenty of meat! Just note that as early as Level 30, it becomes veey hard to get 2-3 Stars, and getting through levels without using coins is VERY very hard by Level 35-40.
In any case, this really is a game that I'm surprised is completely free to play, because it is worth at least around $10 and has more inherent gameplay value than a handful of games that I paid good money for.
So though I don't care much for cosmetic items nor need the coins, I think this developer deserves something for the great work they did bringing this classic puzzle game to VR in a magical way.

developer_response.body:
Hello Dear Teele,

The level designer for our game originally designed all levels to be playable without spending any in-game coins. For the first two years the game was in the store, it relied solely on in-game coin currency, with no real-money store available. During that time, the game was also sold for $9.99 USD.

Unfortunately, we never generated enough income to cover production costs, let alone the updates we've released since. Because of this, we decided to make our game free for everyone, introducing wands and coins as paid options. We're experimenting to see if this approach can help us at least cover production expenses.

Thank you so much for your support. We understand that the game can be too challenging for some players. However, since its initial release, we've been adding more time and moves to certain levels to improve the balance. Our original level designer is a chess and Go professional, and his "balance" preferences, combined with the slight randomness of our game, presented a unique challenge, to say the least!

We are actively working on balancing the game and, more importantly, adding more tutorials. We believe some levels are difficult not due to time or move limits, but because of a lack of clear explanations for our unique game mechanics.

Thank you again for your support. We're sorry to see your 3/5 score. Please let us know which levels you feel need rebalancing, and rest assured we can address them in the next update.
We hope to be able to provide you with new updates in the future. Even if we can't earn on the game yet, we'll probably continue because we believe in the project a lot.

reviews.review_description: This game was fun and entertaining. Simple to do but it does take some strategy.  Great for all ages
I love this game....I just wish there were more levels.... I've played all of the levels, with all of the wands.... please add more levels soon❤️

developer_response.body:
Haha Thank you MzCandie!!
Yeah we will do all what we can to add more content :) We need to reach more audience and get some funding first <3 Your rating helps a lot with that :O

I've played a lot of Match 3 on phones and laptops but now we have a VR version to get excited about.  Check it out!  
This is an update on my review.  I dropped 2 stars.  It's a great game but it's just too hard.  I can't get past level 48.  Please make a Casual option for this game.  Maybe no timers for casual.  Another suggestion, make all levels available.

developer_response.body: Hey! Sorry to hear you got stuck. Thank you for feedback, we are rebalancing level 48 in the next update. We would be grateful for fixing the score as it influences our overall score grately at this point 😊🫰

reviews.review_title: Download it, or you'll miss out on somet
reviews.review_description: This game is truly excellent for relaxation; it thoroughly deserves its 5 stars. It provides a delightful alternative to combat games that can be headache-inducing. It would be great to introduce a nighttime environment where the bricks explode and soar higher into the sky, creating a truly immersive experience. Additionally, consider adding some fireworks effects at the end of each game for a dazzling final touch! 🤩

developer_response.body: Thanks Maria, that sounds like a good idea! We're working on the Alchemist Hut right now, and I think you might enjoy that as well 💙

reviews.review_description: I really,  really enjoy this game.  Hint: if you reach a tough level and don't have enough coins to buy extra moves,  go back and play previous levels to accumulate more coins,  but beware, you earn less 70%.

developer_response.body: Hey! New update is live if you want to check it out 🧙‍♂️

reviews.review_description:
If you like these kind of match-games on a flat screen you will love it in VR too.
A polished, colourful game that is easy to control. Simple and relaxing gameplay, even though time is limited on some levels. Challenging if you waant to get a three star rating on all of them, which adds to replayability.
I'm looking forward to more levels and wands to unlock.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to give us a great review! We will be releasing new updates soon, so keep an eye out for them!

reviews.review_description: Beautiful puzzle game. Waiting for more levels to come! Great job!

developer_response.body: Thank You! Check out the new updates - as we already added +100 more levels since the initial release ;)

reviews.review_title: There is so much to love about this
reviews.review_description:
Thank you very much for this delightful game experience! 

I have just got three stars in all puzzles. Please consider adding leaderboards based on scores to this great game to motivate further striving for achievement!

PS Thank you so much for adding the new challenging puzzles! Let me also mention that the music is beautiful and the environment very pleasant and relaxing.

PPS The new swamp batch of puzzles is unbelievably good! EVERYONE SHOULD DOWNLOAD THIS!

PPPS The new alchemist’s hut is so beautiful! The developers are amazing!

developer_response.body: Amazing! Thanks a lot for the continued support 🤩

reviews.review_description:
Delivers on the core concept and loop 👍 A few notes to consider. MR mode, easily achieved by pulling the skybox as optional. Optional hand-tracking for casual operation and multitasking. Easily a game that allows for multitasking while watching tv etc in passthrough.

Most importantly, consider changing the name, discoverability on Lab is challenging enough and the Store list is substantial to scroll through with the current title before the folded result is presented.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the tips! Yep, mixed reality is definitely on our to-do list 😎

reviews.review_description:
I thought this was going to be one of those phone app games where you match 3, but glad it was not!! It's different, and the game is very large right in front of me. I like the campfire and trees all around. This game does need a couple tweeks but nothing major. 
1. Would love to be able to just play without being timed.
2. More wands would be great.
3. More scenes would be nice.
4. More colors than just the red, orange, yellow, pink, green, blue squares. 
5. Ability to turn the volume down a little, not just on/off.
  I'm only to Level 30, so I don't know how far it goes or if the colored squares change shape. If they do, great. If they don't, it would break the monotony..
  All in all it's very relaxing and fun. Mixed reality would be a plus..

developer_response.body:
Hey! Many thanks for the support! And yes, the scenery and the squares are different for every chapter, so once you pass level 50 you'll unlock it.
Keep smashing it! 🤺💪

reviews.review_description: I love this game! It’s simple in concept so it’s relaxing. You can easily play this stationary. I hope more is added!

developer_response.body: Thanks a ton! And more is coming! 🧙‍♂️

reviews.review_description: What can I say that all the other reviewers haven't. I find this game so amazingly addictive and beautiful to look at. It is spot on perfect,  in my eyes anyway, thank you developers for such a fun entertaining game,

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you for the kind words. Reading such positive reviews is truly motivating and encourages us to continue our development!
